name: MeshItem
summary: The MeshItem class contains information from the meshes in the catalog (mesh_database.inp).

constructors.name: MeshItem
constructors.summary: Creates a new mesh item instance.

methods.name: Export
methods.summary: Exports the rebar item in the catlog to given file name. If path is not given rebar is exported to model folder. If filename is empty rebar name is used as filename.

params.name: filename
params.doc: The export file name of the item.

methods.name: Select
methods.signature: public bool Select(string MeshName, string MeshGrade)
methods.summary: Selects the mesh item in the mesh database.

params.name: MeshName
params.doc: The name of the mesh item to select.

params.name: MeshGrade
params.doc: The grade of the mesh item to select.

properties.name: DiameterCross
properties.summary: The mesh item's cross direction bar size.

properties.name: DiameterLongitudinal
properties.summary: The mesh item's longitudinal direction bar size.

properties.name: DistanceCross
properties.summary: The mesh item's cross direction distance.

properties.name: DistanceLongitudinal
properties.summary: The mesh item's longitudinal direction distance.

properties.name: LeftOverhangCross
properties.summary: The mesh item's cross direction left overhang.

properties.name: LeftOverhangLongitudinal
properties.summary: The mesh item's longitudinal direction left overhang.

properties.name: MaximumOverlappingCross
properties.summary: The mesh item's cross direction maximum overlapping.

properties.name: MaximumOverlappingLongitudinal
properties.summary: The mesh item's longitudinal direction maximum overlapping.

properties.name: MinimumOverlappingCross
properties.summary: The mesh item's cross direction minimum overlapping.

properties.name: MinimumOverlappingLongitudinal
properties.summary: The mesh item's longitudinal direction minimum overlapping.

properties.name: RightOverhangCross
properties.summary: The mesh item's cross direction right overhang.

properties.name: RightOverhangLongitudinal
properties.summary: The mesh item's longitudinal direction right overhang.
